module:bank.title: Bank Module
module:bank.summary: Bank handles native token movement between accounts.
notes: Bank events describe transfer intent and amounts.
Final balance impact still depends on transaction success status.
Fee charging is tracked separately from transfer events.

message_type:MsgSend.title: MsgSend
message_type:MsgSend.summary: MsgSend moves funds from one account to another in a direct transfer.
notes: A MsgSend typically maps to one or more transfer events.
Sender and recipient should be read from structured tx fields when available.
If the transaction failed, emitted transfers are not finalized.

module:wasm.title: Wasm Module
module:wasm.summary: Wasm executes smart-contract calls and emits contract-specific actions.
notes: Contract events explain what the contract attempted to do.
Swap and liquidity actions are common contract-level behaviors.
Use tx status to separate attempted actions from finalized outcomes.

message_type:MsgExecuteContract.title: MsgExecuteContract
message_type:MsgExecuteContract.summary: Executes a method on an existing CosmWasm contract.
notes: Execution may emit wasm action details such as swap fields.
Actual state change is only confirmed when tx status is success.
Contract address and msg index help align actions to execution stages.

module:staking.title: Staking Module
module:staking.summary: Staking controls delegation lifecycle between delegators and validators.
notes: Delegation-family actions include delegate, undelegate, and redelegate.
Reward-claim messages may appear alongside delegation activity.
Interpretation should use explicit message/action fields before assumptions.

message_type:MsgDelegate.title: MsgDelegate
message_type:MsgDelegate.summary: Starts or increases delegation from a delegator to a validator.
notes: Belongs to the staking delegation family.
Amount and participants should come from extracted tx fields when present.

message_type:MsgUndelegate.title: MsgUndelegate
notes: Belongs to the staking delegation family.
Unbonding lifecycle details are chain-level semantics beyond raw tx facts.

message_type:MsgBeginRedelegate.title: MsgBeginRedelegate
message_type:MsgBeginRedelegate.summary: Moves delegated stake from one validator to another.
notes: Belongs to the staking delegation family.
Source and destination validator references should be read from tx artifacts.

module:gov.title: Governance Module
module:gov.summary: Governance records participation in proposal voting workflows.
notes: Vote transactions capture the voter action within governance context.
Proposal meaning should not be guessed beyond available tx evidence.

message_type:MsgVote.title: MsgVote
message_type:MsgVote.summary: Submits a vote for a governance proposal.
notes: Vote option/proposal references must come from transaction fields.
Treat missing governance attributes as unknown instead of inferred.

module:ibc.title: IBC Module
module:ibc.summary: IBC handles cross-chain packet and token transfer workflows.
notes: IBC transactions may include client updates and packet relay events.
Cross-chain completion status may require data beyond a single tx.

message_type:MsgTransfer.title: IBC MsgTransfer
message_type:MsgTransfer.summary: Initiates a token transfer over IBC channels.
notes: Represents transfer initiation in this transaction scope.
Final remote-chain settlement is outside single-tx certainty.
